creator: bert@miint.net
text:
FTP processes are starying around for many days, never timing out.
FTP version came with the 2.1.5 distribution. The same problem seems
to happen with 2.1.6.

Fix: 

kill ftp processes by hand
How-To-Repeat: user ftp's in. Seems to be one type of user, possibly running on a
Macintosh
